channel.title: Coffrep on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Coffrep on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: OW2con’26 — two days of open source conversations with PrestaShop
item.description: OW2con’26 has just wrapped up, and PrestaShop was proud to take part in two packed days (June 2–3) at Orange Innovation Gardens in Paris–Châtillon. As OW2’s annual European open source conference, OW2con delivered what it does best: practical discussions, a welcoming community, and high-quality conversations.

item.title: PrestaShop and OSPO Alliance - Turning Community Energy Into Impact
item.description: We recently had the opportunity to be interviewed by the OSPO Alliance to discuss what open source means at PrestaShop - and, more importantly, what we do to keep a long-running project healthy, collaborative, and sustainable. Open source isn’t a side track for us: it’s part of PrestaShop’s DNA, and it influences how we build, ship, and improve the software together with the community.

item.title: Ecommerce Open Source Summit 2026 - a wrap-up
item.description: The inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) wrapped up after a packed day of conferences, technical deep dives, and networking. Held on March 26, 2026 at Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux, the event brought together developers, agencies, and ecommerce professionals united by a shared commitment to open source ecommerce.

item.title: Join us at the inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) in Paris
item.description: On March 26, 2026, the inaugural Ecommerce Open Source Summit (EO2S) takes over Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux for a full day of conferences, technical deep dives, and networking — all dedicated to open source ecommerce.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 Filmed Sessions - Community and Security
item.description: The PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 edition was another successful gathering! Over 140 people attended in person to connect, share experiences, and strengthen our community. For the first time, we offered a hybrid format, welcoming both onsite and online participants. Special thanks to PayPal for sponsoring the 2025 PrestaShop Developer Conference and presenting during the event.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 Filmed Sessions - Developer Enablement and Growth
item.description: The third PrestaShop Developer Conference took place in November 2025. Three weeks ago, we launched a blog series exploring the event’s sessions and sharing key insights with the community. Last week’s focus was artificial intelligence in PrestaShop development. This week, we’re turning our attention to developer enablement and growth.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 Filmed Sessions - AI and Productivity
item.description: The third PrestaShop Developer Conference took place in November 2025: two weeks ago, we started publishing a series of blog posts diving into the event’s sessions, sharing insights and key takeaways with you. Last week, we spotlighted modern development practices and architectural approaches. This week, we’re continuing the series with a focus on artificial intelligence and productivity.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 Filmed Sessions - Modern Development Practices and Architecture
item.description: The PrestaShop Developer Conference took place a few months ago: last week, we’ve started publishing a series of blog posts diving into the event’s sessions, sharing insights and key takeaways with you. We are continuing the series with another spotlight on modern development practices and architectural approaches.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 - Filmed Morning Sessions and Q&A Now Available
item.description: The PrestaShop Developer Conference happened a few weeks ago, and this year’s edition brought together our vibrant community for a day packed with technical insights, product announcements, and open discussions about the future of PrestaShop. Over the coming weeks, we’ll be publishing a series of blog posts, similar to this one, diving into the event’s sessions, giving you insights and takeaways. Each post will spotlight different talks and themes from the conference.

item.title: From Good Intentions to Measurable Impact: PrestaShop's Call for Contributions at Open Source Experience
item.description: This month of December, Paule Morizot and Fabien Moreau of PrestaShop spoke at Open Source Experience about the project’s Call for Contributions. What a great place to give an update on this topic and to show an experienced crowd what we are currently doing at PrestaShop.

item.title: PrestaShop Developer Conference 2025 - Event Recap
item.description: On November 19, 2025, the PrestaShop developer community convened in Paris, and online via a global livestream, for the third PrestaShop Developer Conference. The program featured hands-on sessions, live demonstrations, and expert talks, alongside a major announcement. Attendees deepened their understanding of the PrestaShop ecosystem, gained project information, and explored practical advancements they can apply in their daily work.

item.title: Dominik Shaim Ulrich: contributing locally with a business providing hosting services
item.description: Ever wondered who’s behind a GitHub username? Now’s your chance to find out! Contributor interviews, like the one you are about to read, let you connect with the people driving the PrestaShop project forward.

item.title: Codencode agency - contributing to work more sustainably over time
item.description: Ever wondered who’s behind a GitHub username? Now’s your chance to find out! Contributor interviews, like the one you are about to read, let you connect with the people driving the PrestaShop project forward.

item.title: FOP Days 2025 - a wrap-up
item.description: The 2025 edition of Friends of Presta (FOP) Days has come to an end, leaving behind two days of discussions, technical insights, and networking. Held on March 26-27 at Le Nida in Issy-les-Moulineaux, the event brought together developers, agencies, and ecommerce professionals from the PrestaShop community.

item.title: Join the community at the FOP (Friends of Presta) Days in Paris
item.description: The Friends of Presta (FOP) Days is an event for PrestaShop and open source ecommerce enthusiasts. Taking place on March 26-27, 2025, at Le Nida, Issy-les-Moulineaux, in the Paris region, this event is dedicated to open source collaboration, technical innovation, and business insights dedicated to the PrestaShop community. You will be able to meet other professionals, exchange ideas, and contribute to the community’s future.
